fixtures.purpose: Exact symbol-target retrieval should keep the authority definition in the top authority band.
Diff-centered retrieval should anchor directly on changed spans and nearby tests.
Fallback parsing should degrade confidence and block autonomy rather than pretend to be exact.
Broad multi-file impact should remain explainable and review-oriented.
Python method/function name collisions should remain explicit and confidence-bounded.
Java normalize-call paths across similarly named utilities should stay explainable and ambiguity-aware.
Elixir aliased module and local function call surfaces should remain bounded under ambiguity.
Elixir def/defp/defdelegate extraction should keep private targets resolvable as authority units.
ExUnit-targeted retrieval should stay plan-safe and preserve test ranking metadata.
TypeScript exact symbol targeting should keep authority units in top_authority with high confidence.
TypeScript broad path targeting should remain ambiguity-aware and plan-safe.
